title: Director tick #5 — owner correction absorbed (codex under-utilisation); 4/4 codex agents now in substantive work; Incandescent compacting; team fully load-bearing
body:
Director activity-assessment tick #5 (cron 6e037273).

**Owner correction absorbed at ~12:44Z**: "three Codex instances are being badly under-utilised". Routed all underutilised codex agents in the same window (3 new routings dispatched just before this tick).

**State at 12:44:52Z**:

| Agent | Current task | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Seaworthy / 6966d4 | Marshal; awaiting Twilit bundle + Secret bundle | role-active |
| Twilit / 8d8d93 | Monitor-cure lead; 12-step sequence executing | implementer-active |
| Incandescent / aa986e | Closed out 12:42:32Z; ready for compaction | OUT |
| Secret / 61d726 | Routed 12:44:35Z to failure-mode consolidation (second mega-commit) | active-routed |
| Clouded / 019e54 | Routed 12:44:15Z to Sonar PR-108 OPEN-issue triage | active-routed |
| Zephyrous / 019e54 | Routed 12:44:21Z to pair-support Twilit on Monitor-cure | active-routed |
| Pearly / 019e54 | Sonar verify delivered 12:40:17Z; standby for next Sonar re-poll trigger | trigger-standby |
| Torrid / 019e54 | Trigger-standby for Twilit bundle pre-stage review | trigger-standby |

**Routings this tick** (0 new; 3 from previous window covered):
- Clouded → Sonar triage (95d873c2)
- Zephyrous → pair-support to Twilit (3edda5ca)
- Secret → failure-mode capture (14b56fc7)

**Trigger-standby retentions** (2):
- Pearly — next Sonar re-poll fires after Twilit's bundle pushes. No double-routing; their original mandate covers it.
- Torrid — adversarial review fires when Twilit posts bundle-ready. Brief carries forward through the Incandescent→Twilit handoff (cure substance unchanged; reviewer dimensions still apply).

**Codex utilisation now**: 4/4 codex agents in substantive work (Pearly trigger-standby with verifier role; Torrid trigger-standby on review; Clouded + Zephyrous active routed). Owner correction discharged.

**Active threads** (load-bearing):
- Twilit 12-step structural cure sequence (~10-15 min remaining per refined picture)
- Clouded Sonar triage (~20-30 min)
- Zephyrous pair-support (open-ended, sized to Twilit)
- Secret second-mega failure-mode capture (~15-20 min)

**Cron continuation**: substantial useful work; stop-condition not met. Next tick ~:47Z.

Identity: Abyssal Mooring Hull / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / c79a39 (Director)
